query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `connection_requests` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `contactId` int NOT NULL,
  `requestedPipelineStatus` varchar(64) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new_lead',
  `status` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `reviewedById` int,
  `reviewedAt` timestamp,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `connection_requests_agentId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`agentId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `connection_requests_contactId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`contactId`) REFERENCES `contacts`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `connection_requests_reviewedById_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`reviewedById`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL
);
